items.title: Mardi Gras 2025: LIVE from New Orleans
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from the Old Absinthe House as Mardi Gras celebrations take place in the French Quarter of New Orleans.

Mardi Gras marks the party’s climax and the end of Carnival season on the Gulf Coast. It falls on the day before Ash Wednesday and is seen as a final day of feasting and revelry before Lent.

#mardigras #neworleans #live</article>

items.title: Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau slams Trump’s tariffs
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>President Donald Trump launched a trade war Tuesday against America’s three biggest trading partners, drawing retaliation. Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau said his country would plaster tariffs on more than $100 billion of American goods over the course of 21 days. #shorts #Trump #tariffs #Canada #Mexico #China #Trudeau #Sheinbaum</article>

items.title: 'The Pitt' star Noah Wyle: trust medical experts
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Former “ER” star Noah Wyle has put his stethoscope back on to play Dr. Robby in Max’s “The Pitt.” The actor believes his new show helps to empower the audience when it comes to their own health care.

items.title: LIVE: Outside hospital after Pope Francis suffered new breathing crises
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live view from outside Gemelli Hospital in Rome where Pope Francis is being treated. The Vatican said on Monday that the 88-year-old pope suffered two new acute respiratory crises and was put back on noninvasive mechanical ventilation, in another setback to his battle to fight pneumonia. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4h34IaJ

#popefrancis #pope #live</article>

items.title: Trudeau: Trump wants to destroy Canada's economy to 'make it easier to annex us'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau speculated that President Donald Trump imposed tariffs on Canada to hurt its economy so it's easier for it to be annexed as a U.S. state. "That's never going to happen," he said. Read more: https://bit.ly/4imMYIw 

#trudeau #trump #canada

items.title: LIVE: View from Mexico-U.S. border after Trump tariffs take effect
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from the Mexico-U.S. border after President Donald Trump’s long-threatened tariffs against Canada and Mexico went into effect Tuesday.

Starting just past midnight, imports from Canada and Mexico are now to be taxed at 25%, with Canadian energy products subject to 10% import duties.

The 10% tariff that Trump placed on Chinese imports in February was doubled to 20%, and Beijing retaliated Tuesday with tariffs of up to 15% on a wide array of U.S. farm exports. It also expanded the number of U.S. companies subject to export controls and other restrictions by about two dozen. Live updates: https://bit.ly/41mfEul

#live #mexico #trump</article>

items.title: Chaotic scene erupts in Serbia's parliament amid political tensions
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Lawmakers were scheduled to vote on a law that would increase funding for university education, but opposition parties said the ruling majority was also planning to approve dozens of other decisions. They said that was illegal and that lawmakers should first confirm the resignation of Prime Minister Miloš Vučević and his government, prompting chaos. Read more: https://bit.ly/4hdqB7b

#serbia #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.content:
<article>Live from the Grand Mosque in Mecca, Saudi Arabia, as Muslims gather for prayers during the holy month of Ramadan. The Grand Mosque houses the Kaaba, Islam’s holiest site. See images from the Middle East as Muslims observe Ramadan: https://bit.ly/41reGwM

items.title: LIVE: NASA’s stuck astronauts hold press conference from Space Station
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live the pre-departure news conference of NASA’s SpaceX Crew-9 on the International Space Station. NASA astronauts Nick Hague, Suni Williams, Butch Wilmore and Roscosmos cosmonaut Aleksandr Gorbunov are expected to return to Earth in mid-March. The liftoff of NASA’s next crew is targeted for March 12.

Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams arrived at the space station in June 2024 and were expected to stay just a week. But Boeing’s Starliner capsule had so much trouble getting to the space station that NASA decided to bring it back empty and reassigned the pair to SpaceX.

Credit: NASA

#nasa #space #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: Donald Trump delivers speech to Congress
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as President Donald Trump delivers a speech to a joint session of Congress.

It's not officially called the State of the Union, a title reserved for a president's annual address to Congress during other years of an administration, but it is an opportunity for Trump to lay out his priorities for the year.

#trump #news #live #donaldtrump</article>
